segments.text: Right, forward smash on the ledge line—that's a KO!
segments.original_text: ますよね 崖ラインの横スマに当たったら撃墜です

segments.text: Nair this time aiming high—looking to set up that stock, and the forward smash is bringing the pressure!
segments.original_text: 空Nなる今度は高め 寿命撃墜まで見据えるためにも横スマが圧かけてきた

full_text: Right, forward smash on the ledge line—that's a KO! Nair this time aiming high—looking to set up that stock, and the forward smash is bringing the pressure!

corrections.original: 横須磨がアブセイできた
corrections.corrected: 横スマが圧かけてきた
